hero.eyebrow: A desktop player built for music
hero.title: OriginalSound HQ
hero.subtitle: Unleash your musical soul. A modern, minimalist local music player that offers an ultimate immersive listening experience.

features.title: Built for listening
features.subtitle: Four core capabilities covering every need of local music playback.

spectrum.title: Audio Visualization
spectrum.content: Spectrum analysis meets rich dynamic visual effects. Real-time audio processing turns music into both an auditory and visual art experience.
spectrum.feat1_desc: Realtime spectrum analysis from system audio stream
spectrum.feat2_desc: Built-in visual styles, switch with one click

guide.title: User Guide
guide.intro: Complete coverage of every setting and feature in OriginalSound HQ. Whether you're installing for the first time or a power user, you'll find what you need here.
guide.footer_text: If something is not covered here, please report it on GitHub Issues, or check the FAQ for more.

getting-started.title: Getting Started
getting-started.intro: From scratch: system requirements, installation, and adding your music library.

audio.title: Audio Settings
audio.intro: Output devices, buffer size, DSD handling, fade in/out, and other audio options.

interface.title: Interface
interface.intro: Default entry page and the default music browsing view.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.intro: Folder watch, memory trim, window position reset, and other advanced behaviors.

shortcuts.title: Hotkeys
shortcuts.intro: Customizable global hotkeys that respond even when the app is not in focus.

cover.title: Cover & Background
cover.intro: Cover size, cache, auto matching, shader backgrounds, effects, and palette algorithms.

lyrics.title: Lyrics
lyrics.intro: Font, size, alignment, margins, animation effects, target frame rate, and colors.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.intro: Window backdrop materials, theme, and cover-based accent color.

close-button.title: Close Button
close-button.intro: The behavior when the window close button is clicked.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: A collection of the most common issues users encounter with their solutions. If you don't find an answer here, please open an issue on GitHub.

sidebar.title: Still need help?
sidebar.text: The full user guide covers every setting in the app. For anything not addressed by the FAQ, feel free to open an issue.

visualization.title: Audio Visualization
visualization.subtitle: Spectrum analysis meets rich dynamic visual effects, turning music into both an auditory and visual art experience.

f1.title: Realtime Spectrum
f1.desc: Real-time FFT analysis on the system audio stream with smooth spectrum visualization.

f2.title: High-performance
f2.desc: Hardware-accelerated rendering via DirectX 11 / Direct2D with low CPU footprint.

f3.title: Multiple styles
f3.desc: Built-in visual presets including spectrum bars, waveforms, and particle effects.

f4.title: Lightweight & standalone
f4.desc: Runs independently of the main player. Can be used on its own.

footer.tagline: A modern local music player built for listening. Immersive UI, ultimate sound quality, fully customizable.
